---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, capability, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What would you like open-sim to do? If it's a new tool, sketch the inputs/outputs.

## Keep it generic

open-sim avoids hardcoded, app-specific logic. How does this stay generic (a primitive that works across apps) rather than baking in one app's behavior?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, including existing tools or `run_simctl`.

## Additional context

Anything else — links, screenshots, references.
